Credfeto.ChangeLog.Cmd 1.10.194.1735-main+d52ee3d0735be0ee29f4ab6b481ad2a262b0d026
Mark Ridgwell
-f, --changelog         The changelog filename to use
-v, --version           (Group: Commands) The version to extract
-x, --extract           (Group: Commands) The filename to write the extracted
-r, --remove            (Group: Commands) The entry type to remove
-a, --add               (Group: Commands) The entry type to add
-m, --message           The message to add
-t, --check-insert      (Group: Commands) The branch to check the changelog
again
-c, --create-release    (Group: Commands) The release version to create
-p, --Pending           If the release is pending
-u, --un-released       (Group: Commands) Prints the unreleased section to the
console.
--help                  Display this help screen.
--version               Display version information.
